recipe_text: To two large oranges peeled and picked to pieces, add a cup of sugar. Boil a quart of milk mixed with the yolks of three eggs, and two dessert-spoons of corn-starch. Cool it and stir into it the orange and sugar. Cover it with meringue made of the whites of the eggs, and a little sugar, and brown in the oven.
ingredients: ['2 large oranges', '1 cup sugar', '1 quart milk', '3 egg yolks', '2 dessert-spoons corn-starch', 'whites of 3 eggs', 'sugar (for meringue)']
steps: ['Peel and pick the oranges into pieces.', 'Add a cup of sugar to the oranges.', 'Boil the milk mixed with the egg yolks and corn-starch.', 'Cool the mixture.', 'Stir the orange and sugar into the cooled mixture.', 'Cover with a meringue made of the egg whites and a little sugar.', 'Brown in the oven.']

recipe_text: Grate one dozen ears of corn, not too young. Add one quart milk, four or five beaten eggs, a dessert-spoon of
ingredients: ['1 dozen ears of corn', '1 quart milk', '4 or 5 beaten eggs']
steps: ['Grate the ears of corn.', 'Add the milk and beaten eggs.']

recipe_text: One quart milk. One quarter box of gelatine. Three eggs. Three table-spoons of sugar. Put the gelatine to soak in a little of the milk. Boil the rest and pour on it. Beat the yolks well with the sugar, and mix them with the milk and gelatine, and a little salt. When nearly cold, add four table-spoons of wine. Beat the whites with one cup of sugar and juice of a lemon; spread it over the top and set it in the oven to brown.
ingredients: ['One quart milk', 'One quarter box of gelatine', 'Three eggs', 'Three table-spoons of sugar', 'a little salt', 'four table-spoons of wine', 'one cup of sugar', 'juice of a lemon']
steps: ['Put the gelatine to soak in a little of the milk.', 'Boil the rest and pour on it.', 'Beat the yolks well with the sugar, and mix them with the milk and gelatine, and a little salt.', 'When nearly cold, add four table-spoons of wine.', 'Beat the whites with one cup of sugar and juice of a lemon; spread it over the top and set it in the oven to brown.']

recipe_text: Fill a baking dish half full of peaches or tart apples cut up, or strawberries. Beat the whites of eggs, more or less, according to the size of the dish, to a stiff froth, adding a heaping table-spoon of powdered sugar for each egg. Set in a quick oven to brown.
ingredients: ['peaches or tart apples cut up, or strawberries', 'whites of eggs', 'heaping table-spoon of powdered sugar for each egg']
steps: ['Fill a baking dish half full of peaches or tart apples cut up, or strawberries.', 'Beat the whites of eggs, more or less, according to the size of the dish, to a stiff froth, adding a heaping table-spoon of powdered sugar for each egg.', 'Set in a quick oven to brown.']

recipe_text: One pint of bread crumbs. One quart of milk. One cup of sugar. Butter the size of an egg. Yolks of five eggs, well beaten. The grated rind of one lemon. Bake like custard, then spread over it a layer of jelly or preserves. Beat the whites of the eggs to a stiff froth, adding one cup of powdered sugar, and spread it over the top. Set it in the oven to brown.
ingredients: ['One pint of bread crumbs', 'One quart of milk', 'One cup of sugar', 'Butter the size of an egg', 'Yolks of five eggs', 'Grated rind of one lemon', 'Jelly or preserves', 'Whites of five eggs', 'One cup of powdered sugar']
steps: ['Mix bread crumbs, milk, sugar, butter, beaten yolks, and lemon rind.', 'Bake like custard.', 'Spread a layer of jelly or preserves over the top.', 'Beat the whites of the eggs to a stiff froth with one cup of powdered sugar.', 'Spread the egg white mixture over the top.', 'Set in the oven to brown.']

recipe_text: One pint of milk. One pint of flour. Two eggs. A little salt. Fill nine cups half full and bake half an hour.
ingredients: ['One pint of milk', 'One pint of flour', 'Two eggs', 'A little salt']
steps: ['Combine milk, flour, eggs, and salt.', 'Fill nine cups half full.', 'Bake half an hour.']

recipe_text: Scald two table-spoons of Madeira wine with the same quantity of water. Rub together two cups of sugar and one of butter, and add the beaten yolks of two eggs, and put into the scalding wine. Then add the beaten whites of the eggs.
ingredients: ['Two table-spoons of Madeira wine', 'Two table-spoons of water', 'Two cups of sugar', 'One cup of butter', 'Yolks of two eggs', 'Whites of two eggs']
steps: ['Scald the wine and water together.', 'Rub the sugar and butter together.', 'Add the beaten yolks to the sugar and butter mixture.', 'Combine the sugar/butter/yolk mixture with the scalding wine.', 'Add the beaten whites of the eggs.']

recipe_text: One lb. of eggs. One lb. of powdered sugar. Half lb. of flour. Beat the eggs separately. Any good recipe for Sponge Cake will do. JELLY FOR THE ABOVE. Beat, to a stiff froth, the white of an egg. Add sugar enough to make it a little stiff. Then add the grated rind and juice of an orange. The above cake can be baked in jelly-cake tins, or in thick loaves, to be split when cold.
ingredients: ['1 lb. eggs', '1 lb. powdered sugar', '1/2 lb. flour', '1 white of an egg', 'Sugar', 'Grated rind of an orange', 'Juice of an orange']
steps: ['Beat the eggs separately.', 'Prepare the cake batter using the eggs, sugar, and flour (or any good Sponge Cake recipe).', 'Bake in jelly-cake tins or thick loaves to be split when cold.', 'For the jelly: Beat the white of an egg to a stiff froth.', 'Add sugar to the egg white until slightly stiff.', 'Stir in the grated rind and juice of an orange.']

recipe_text: Cake the same as for Orange Cake. FOR JELLY. Beat, to a stiff froth, the white of an egg. Stiffen with grated chocolate, and perhaps a handful of powdered sugar. Proceed as for Orange Cake.
ingredients: ['white of an egg', 'grated chocolate', 'powdered sugar']
steps: ['Beat the white of an egg to a stiff froth.', 'Stiffen with grated chocolate and a handful of powdered sugar.', 'Proceed as for Orange Cake.']

recipe_text: Two cups of sugar. Half a cup of butter. One cup of milk. Three eggs. Three cups of flour. One tea-spoon of cream tartar. Half a tea-spoon of soda. Bake in thick loaves and split when cold. JELLY FOR THE ABOVE. One cup of grated chocolate. Two cups of sugar. Half a cup of milk. As soon as it boils, pour a layer over the lower layer of cake. Lay another layer of cake and pour another layer of chocolate. Lay the top layer of cake, and letting the rest of the chocolate boil until it strings in water, pour it over the whole.
ingredients: ['2 cups sugar', '1/2 cup butter', '1 cup milk', '3 eggs', '3 cups flour', '1 tea-spoon cream tartar', '1/2 tea-spoon soda', '1 cup grated chocolate', '2 cups sugar', '1/2 cup milk']
steps: ['Mix sugar, butter, milk, eggs, flour, cream tartar, and soda.', 'Bake in thick loaves and split when cold.', 'For the jelly, combine grated chocolate, sugar, and milk.', 'As soon as it boils, pour a layer over the lower layer of cake.', 'Lay another layer of cake and pour another layer of chocolate.', 'Lay the top layer of cake.', 'Let the rest of the chocolate boil until it strings in water, then pour it over the whole.']

recipe_text: Three eggs, One cup of sugar. One cup of flour. Bake in jelly-cake tins, two layers. CUSTARD FOR THE ABOVE. Half a pint of milk. Two table-spoons of sugar. Two table-spoons of flour. One egg. Boil the custard and flavor with vanilla.
ingredients: ['Three eggs', 'One cup of sugar', 'One cup of flour', 'Half a pint of milk', 'Two table-spoons of sugar', 'Two table-spoons of flour', 'One egg', 'Vanilla']
steps: ['Bake cake in jelly-cake tins, two layers.', 'Boil the custard ingredients and flavor with vanilla.']

recipe_text: One lb. of flour. One lb. of sugar. Three quarter lb. of butter. One quarter less with cream. One cup of cream or milk. Four eggs separated. One tea-spoon of soda. One tea-spoon of cloves and cinnamon, citron, currants and raisins. One glass of wine and one nutmeg.
ingredients: ['One lb. of flour', 'One lb. of sugar', 'Three quarter lb. of butter', 'One cup of cream or milk', 'Four eggs separated', 'One tea-spoon of soda', 'One tea-spoon of cloves', 'One tea-spoon of cinnamon', 'Citron', 'Currants', 'Raisins', 'One glass of wine', 'One nutmeg']

recipe_text: One cup of butter. Two cups of sugar. Three cups of flour. Four eggs. Half a cup of milk. One tea-spoon of soda. One cup of raisins. One cup of currants, citron, One tea-spoon of cloves, cinnamon and allspice.
ingredients: ['One cup of butter', 'Two cups of sugar', 'Three cups of flour', 'Four eggs', 'Half a cup of milk', 'One tea-spoon of soda', 'One cup of raisins', 'One cup of currants', 'Citron', 'One tea-spoon of cloves', 'One tea-spoon of cinnamon', 'One tea-spoon of allspice']

recipe_text: Whites of three eggs. One and a half cups of sugar. Half a cup of butter. Three cups of flour. One cup of milk. Half a tea-spoon of soda. One tea-spoon of cream tartar. One tea-spoon of extract of almond. Use the yolks in the same way.
ingredients: ['Whites of three eggs', 'One and a half cups of sugar', 'Half a cup of butter', 'Three cups of flour', 'One cup of milk', 'Half a tea-spoon of soda', 'One tea-spoon of cream tartar', 'One tea-spoon of extract of almond', 'Yolks of three eggs']
steps: ['Mix ingredients together.', 'Use the yolks in the same way.']

recipe_text: One lb. of eggs. One lb. of sugar. Half a lb. of flour. Beat the eggs separately.
ingredients: ['One lb. of eggs', 'One lb. of sugar', 'Half a lb. of flour']
steps: ['Beat the eggs separately.', 'Combine ingredients.']

recipe_text: Take eight ounces of sweet almonds and four ounces of bitter ones; throw them into boiling water for five minutes; take out and skin them, pound them in a mortar; when fine enough, mix in four ounces of flour. The flour must be dry and well sifted. Then beat the yolks of two eggs; add to it eight ounces of fine white sugar, then add the whites of four eggs, beaten to a stiff froth. Add the
ingredients: ['Eight ounces of sweet almonds', 'Four ounces of bitter almonds', 'Four ounces of flour', 'Yolks of two eggs', 'Eight ounces of fine white sugar', 'Whites of four eggs']
steps: ['Throw almonds into boiling water for five minutes.', 'Take out and skin the almonds.', 'Pound almonds in a mortar.', 'Mix in four ounces of dry, well-sifted flour.', 'Beat the yolks of two eggs.', 'Add eight ounces of fine white sugar to the yolks.', 'Add the whites of four eggs, beaten to a stiff froth.']

recipe_text: One and a half lbs. of flour. One lb. of sugar. Twelve ounces of butter. Five eggs. Half a gill of milk. One table-spoon of lemon extract. Two tea-spoons of cream tartar. One tea-spoon of soda. One tea-spoon of almond extract can be used, if preferred.
ingredients: ['1 1/2 lbs. flour', '1 lb. sugar', '12 ounces butter', '5 eggs', '1/2 gill milk', '1 table-spoon lemon extract', '2 tea-spoons cream tartar', '1 tea-spoon soda', '1 tea-spoon almond extract (optional)']
steps: ['Combine ingredients and bake.']

recipe_text: One cup of molasses. One cup of butter. Two cups of sugar. Four eggs. Three cups of flour. One cup of milk. One tea-spoon of soda. One table-spoon of ginger.
ingredients: ['1 cup molasses', '1 cup butter', '2 cups sugar', '4 eggs', '3 cups flour', '1 cup milk', '1 tea-spoon soda', '1 table-spoon ginger']
steps: ['Combine ingredients and bake.']

recipe_text: One quart flour. One pint milk. Two eggs. Butter the size of an egg. One tea-spoon of soda. Two tea-spoons of cream tartar. Bake in a quick oven and heated pans.
ingredients: ['1 quart flour', '1 pint milk', '2 eggs', 'Butter the size of an egg', '1 tea-spoon soda', '2 tea-spoons cream tartar']
steps: ['Combine ingredients.', 'Bake in a quick oven and heated pans.']

recipe_text: One pint of sour milk, A little salt. One table-spoon of sugar. One tea-spoon of soda or saleratus. Graham flour enough to make as stiff a batter as can well be stirred.
ingredients: ['One pint of sour milk', 'A little salt', 'One table-spoon of sugar', 'One tea-spoon of soda or saleratus', 'Graham flour']
steps: ['Mix ingredients to make as stiff a batter as can well be stirred.']

recipe_text: One pint of corn meal. One pint of sour milk. Two eggs. A little salt. Two table-spoons of sugar. Three tea-spoons of melted butter. Two small teaspoons of soda or saleratus. A handful of bread crumbs dried. Bake in a quick oven.
ingredients: ['One pint of corn meal', 'One pint of sour milk', 'Two eggs', 'A little salt', 'Two table-spoons of sugar', 'Three tea-spoons of melted butter', 'Two small teaspoons of soda or saleratus', 'A handful of bread crumbs dried']
steps: ['Combine ingredients.', 'Bake in a quick oven.']

recipe_text: Seven lbs. of fruit. Three and a half lbs. of sugar. One ounce of whole cinnamon. One ounce of whole cloves. Weigh the fruit and sugar. Push the pulp from the skins. Boil the pulp; when done, put it through a sieve. Put one quart of vinegar on the fire, with the sugar, and boil once. Then put the skins and pulp in with the spice and boil it a half hour or longer. Tie the spices in a piece of thin muslin.
ingredients: ['Seven lbs. of fruit', 'Three and a half lbs. of sugar', 'One ounce of whole cinnamon', 'One ounce of whole cloves', 'One quart of vinegar']
steps: ['Weigh the fruit and sugar.', 'Push the pulp from the skins.', 'Boil the pulp; when done, put it through a sieve.', 'Put one quart of vinegar on the fire, with the sugar, and boil once.', 'Put the skins and pulp in with the spice and boil it a half hour or longer.', 'Tie the spices in a piece of thin muslin.']

recipe_text: Eight lbs. of tomatoes peeled. Four lbs. of sugar. Allspice, cloves and cinnamon (ground), half an ounce each. Boil one hour. When pretty cool, add one pint of vinegar.
ingredients: ['8 lbs. tomatoes, peeled', '4 lbs. sugar', '1/2 oz. allspice (ground)', '1/2 oz. cloves (ground)', '1/2 oz. cinnamon (ground)', '1 pint vinegar']
steps: ['Boil the tomatoes, sugar, and spices for one hour.', 'When the mixture is pretty cool, add the vinegar.']

recipe_text: Ten lbs. of cucumbers, pared and sliced, and with seeds taken out. Five lbs. of sugar. One ounce of cloves. One ounce of cinnamon. Half ounce of allspice. Three pints of vinegar. Put the cucumbers into clear water and boil until you can easily put a silver fork through it, and then drain it through a cullender. Put the spices in a bag. Boil the sugar, spices and vinegar, and pour over the cucumber. Let it stand three days. Then pour off and scald the syrup and pour back. Do this three times.
ingredients: ['10 lbs. cucumbers, pared, sliced, and seeded', '5 lbs. sugar', '1 oz. cloves', '1 oz. cinnamon', '1/2 oz. allspice', '3 pints vinegar']
steps: ['Put the cucumbers into clear water and boil until a silver fork can easily pass through them.', 'Drain the cucumbers through a cullender.', 'Put the spices in a bag.', 'Boil the sugar, spices, and vinegar together.', 'Pour the hot mixture over the cucumbers.', 'Let stand for three days.', 'Pour off the syrup, scald it, and pour it back over the cucumbers.', 'Repeat the scalding process three times.']

recipe_text: Slice a peck of green tomatoes; sprinkle salt on them and let them lie over night. Drain them and then boil twenty
ingredients: ['1 peck green tomatoes', 'Salt']
steps: ['Slice the green tomatoes.', 'Sprinkle with salt and let lie overnight.', 'Drain the tomatoes.', 'Boil (text cut off).']

recipe_text: One peck of green tomatoes. Six peppers, taking out the seeds. Three onions. Chop together and cover them over night, adding two-thirds of a cup of salt. In the morning, draw off the liquor and just cover with vinegar. add one and a half cups of sugar. Less than a cup of made mustard. A table-spoon of cloves, allspice and cinnamon. Boil all about twenty minutes or more. Much improved by the addition of cauliflower and celery, with the other things.
ingredients: ['One peck of green tomatoes', 'Six peppers', 'Three onions', 'Two-thirds of a cup of salt', 'Vinegar', 'One and a half cups of sugar', 'Less than a cup of made mustard', 'A table-spoon of cloves', 'Allspice', 'Cinnamon', 'Cauliflower (optional)', 'Celery (optional)']
steps: ['Chop the tomatoes, peppers, and onions together.', 'Cover the mixture over night, adding two-thirds of a cup of salt.', 'In the morning, draw off the liquor.', 'Cover the mixture with vinegar.', 'Add sugar, made mustard, cloves, allspice, and cinnamon.', 'Boil all about twenty minutes or more.', 'Add cauliflower and celery if desired.']

recipe_text: Rub together one cup of sugar and a piece of butter the size of a large egg. Add a well-beaten egg. Scald a pint of equal quantities of vinegar and water, and pour on these ingredients. When well mixed, pour it over the cabbage and stir it well. The cabbage should lie in cold water first, and then be finely chopped. Serve when cold.
ingredients: ['one cup of sugar', 'piece of butter the size of a large egg', 'one well-beaten egg', 'a pint of equal quantities of vinegar and water', 'cabbage']
steps: ['Rub together one cup of sugar and a piece of butter the size of a large egg.', 'Add a well-beaten egg.', 'Scald a pint of equal quantities of vinegar and water, and pour on these ingredients.', 'When well mixed, pour it over the cabbage and stir it well.', 'The cabbage should lie in cold water first, and then be finely chopped.', 'Serve when cold.']

recipe_text: To one lobster, boiled and cut in small pieces, add a pint of milk or water. A small piece of butter the size of half an egg, a little pepper and a little salt. Stew this together about ten minutes. Serve hot.
ingredients: ['one lobster, boiled and cut in small pieces', 'a pint of milk or water', 'a small piece of butter the size of half an egg', 'a little pepper', 'a little salt']
steps: ['To one lobster, boiled and cut in small pieces, add a pint of milk or water.', 'Add a small piece of butter the size of half an egg, a little pepper and a little salt.', 'Stew this together about ten minutes.', 'Serve hot.']
